title: Tunisian Beef Tagine
description: A flavorful North African stew made with tender beef and richly aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: beef (1 pound, cut into small pieces)
ingredients.notes: Use a tougher cut of beef, such as shank or short ribs.

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use a good quality olive oil for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: onion
ingredients.notes: Chop the onion into small pieces for easier cooking.

ingredients.name: garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince the garlic for best flavor.

ingredients.name: tunisian spice blend
ingredients.notes: A mix of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon.

ingredients.name: black pepper
ingredients.notes: Add more black pepper to taste.

ingredients.name: chicken broth
ingredients.notes: Use low-sodium broth for best flavor.

ingredients.name: dried apricots
ingredients.notes: Chop the apricots into small pieces.

ingredients.name: almonds
ingredients.notes: Chop the almonds into small pieces.

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the tunisian spice blend, cumin, coriander, cinnamon, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Stir in the dried apricots and almonds.
Simmer for 10 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley, if desired.
